name: @razllivan/pi-minimax-m3-caching-fix
description_en: MiniMax-M3 on the OpenAI-compatible endpoint with passive caching. Wraps the built-in openai-completions streamSimple driver to clean duplicated and inline <think>…</think> thinking in flight, mirroring the upstream skipThinkingBlock compat flag for pi-ai
description_zh: OpenAI 兼容端点上的 MiniMax-M3，带有被动缓存。包装内置的 openai-completions streamSimple 驱动程序，以清理传输中重复的内联思考，模仿上游 skipThinkingBlock 兼容标志
